chunks.title: Death of Samuel and David in the Wilderness
chunks.reason: Narrative introduction setting the scene for the main story.

chunks.title: David's Request and Nabal's Rejection
chunks.reason: Complete narrative unit covering the initial interaction and David's angry reaction.

chunks.title: Abigail's Intervention
chunks.reason: The turning point where Abigail learns of the crisis and prepares provisions.

chunks.title: Abigail Meets David and Pleads for Mercy
chunks.reason: The core dramatic encounter featuring Abigail's speech and David's acceptance.

chunks.title: Nabal's Death and Abigail Marries David
chunks.reason: Resolution of the conflict and the conclusion of the narrative arc.
